mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(IFNULL(msg_field,db_field),msg_field) AS db_field, col_name_zh, db_col_type, col_group, map_content, rec_id, mem FROM tfm_alarm_col_info WHERE ( msg_field IS NOT NULL OR db_field = 'rule_name') AND col_disp_type = 1
select t.template_id,t.template_name,t.description,t.owner_id,u.user_name,t.create_time,t.columns_value from tfp_column_template t,tai_userinfo u where u.user_id=t.owner_id and template_id=0
select t.template_id as id , t.template_name as txt from tfp_column_template t

SELECT level_0_value, level_0_label,level_1_value, level_1_label,level_2_value, level_2_label FROM (SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(city_id, '0') AS level_0_value, IFNULL(city_name, '0') AS level_0_label, IFNULL(region_id, '0') AS level_1_value, IFNULL(region_name, '0') AS level_1_label, IFNULL(province_id, '0') AS level_2_value, IFNULL(province_name, '0') AS level_2_label, pcode FROM region_city_local) A ORDER BY pcode+0
select id, txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 5 and valid = 1
select id, txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1317 and valid = 1
SELECT id,txt,type_name_en FROM tia_alarm_dict WHERE TYPE=1001 AND valid=1 ORDER BY type_name_en+0
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1037 and valid = 1 order by txt
select ID, TXT from (select IFNULL(type, '0') as id, IFNULL(vendor_text, '0') as txt from vendor_name where type >=0 order by vendor_text) A
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1 and id >=100 order by txt
select distinct t.group_id id, t.group_name txt from tai_group_info t where t.group_type_id = 1 order by t.group_name
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9 and valid = 1 and id >=100 order by txt
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 6 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 45 and valid = 1

select '省部接口上报' as id, '省部接口上报' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采话务' as id, '集团直采话务' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采数据' as id, '集团直采数据' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采传输' as id, '集团直采传输' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采国际局' as id, '集团直采国际局' as txt from tia_condition_def
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1318 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1023 and valid = 1
select distinct a.id, a.txt from ( select '3,7' id, '成功' txt from tia_alarm_dict union all select '4,10,11' id, '失败' txt from tia_alarm_dict) a
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 4 and valid = 1
select id, txt from (select distinct 0 id, '否' txt from tia_alarm_dict union select distinct -1 id, '是' txt from tia_alarm_dict) a
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1028 and valid = 1 and id != 0
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1029 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=101102 and valid=1 order by id
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=101103 and valid=1 order by id
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 1323 and valid = 1
select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 30 and valid = 1

select id, txt from (select distinct 'allFilters' id, '全部过滤器' txt from tia_alarm_dict union select distinct 'myFilters' id, '我的过滤器' txt from tia_alarm_dict union select distinct 'ruleFitlers' id, '派单规则' txt from tia_alarm_dict) a
